option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/background_sunny" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Header Section --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/btn_menu" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp"
android:background="@drawable/glass_card" android:padding="12dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_sort_by_size" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:tint="@android:color/white" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/et_input" android:layout_width="146dp"
android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/input_value" android:inputType="numberDecimal|numberSigned" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/location_section" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/header_text" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/btn_menu" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header_text" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:gravity="end" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@+id/btn_menu" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/btn_menu">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:letterSpacing="0.2" android:text="@string/atmospheric" android:textColor="#8CACFF" android:textSize="10sp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alpha="0.6" android:letterSpacing="0.2" android:text="@string/app" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="10sp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Location & Date --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/location_section" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="32dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/btn_menu">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_location" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Cidade" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="normal" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_date" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alpha="0.7" android:letterSpacing="0.1" android:text="@string/Data" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Hero Sun section --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/sun_hero" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginTop="48dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/location_section">
<!-- Halo effect (simplificed as a view with circle background) -->
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:alpha="0.3" android:background="@drawable/glass_card" />
<ImageView android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_day" app:tint="#FE9C41" /> </FrameLayout>
<!-- Temperature & Status --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/temp_section" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/sun_hero">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_temp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Temperatura" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="60sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_status" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alpha="0.8" android:letterSpacing="0.1" android:text="@string/Tempo" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Metrics Section (Simplified grid) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/metrics_grid" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="32dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/temp_section">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@drawable/glass_card" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Humidade" android:alpha="0.6" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="10sp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/_45" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold"/> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="1dp"/>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@drawable/glass_card" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Vento" android:alpha="0.6" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="10sp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Velo_Vento" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Floating Dock (Dock effect) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/floating_dock" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="64dp" android:layout_margin="24dp" android:background="@drawable/glass_card" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="32dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_gallery" app:tint="#8CACFF" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_my_calendar" app:tint="@android:color/white" android:alpha="0.6" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_mapmode" app:tint="@android:color/white" android:alpha="0.6" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_preferences" app:tint="@android:color/white" android:alpha="0.6" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/background_sunny" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Header Section --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/btn_menu" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp"
android:background="@drawable/glass_card" android:padding="12dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_sort_by_size" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:tint="@android:color/white" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/et_input" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:hint="@string/input_value" android:inputType="numberDecimal|numberSigned" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@+id/btn_menu" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/header_text" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/btn_menu" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/btn_menu" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header_text" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:gravity="end" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@+id/btn_menu" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/btn_menu">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:letterSpacing="0.2" android:text="@string/atmospheric" android:textColor="#8CACFF" android:textSize="10sp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alpha="0.6" android:letterSpacing="0.2" android:text="@string/app" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="10sp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Location & Date --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/location_section" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="32dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/btn_menu">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_location" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Cidade" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="normal" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_date" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alpha="0.7" android:letterSpacing="0.1" android:text="@string/Data" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Hero Sun section --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/sun_hero" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginTop="48dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/location_section">
<!-- Halo effect (simplificed as a view with circle background) -->
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:alpha="0.3" android:background="@drawable/glass_card" />
<ImageView android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_day" app:tint="#FE9C41" /> </FrameLayout>
<!-- Temperature & Status --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/temp_section" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/sun_hero">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_temp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Temperatura" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="60sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_status" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alpha="0.8" android:letterSpacing="0.1" android:text="@string/Tempo" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Metrics Section (Simplified grid) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/metrics_grid" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="32dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/temp_section">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@drawable/glass_card" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Humidade" android:alpha="0.6" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="10sp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/_45" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold"/> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="1dp"/>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@drawable/glass_card" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Vento" android:alpha="0.6" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="10sp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/Velo_Vento" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Floating Dock (Dock effect) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/floating_dock" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="64dp" android:layout_margin="24dp" android:background="@drawable/glass_card" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="32dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_gallery" app:tint="#8CACFF" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_my_calendar" app:tint="@android:color/white" android:alpha="0.6" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_mapmode" app:tint="@android:color/white" android:alpha="0.6" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_preferences" app:tint="@android:color/white" android:alpha="0.6" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
